<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check top bar nodes
current = current_frame.segmentation
print("Top bar nodes:")
for n in current['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'c', 'W'):
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) / len(n['boundary'])
        if center_r < 10:  # top bar
            print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} center≈({center_r:.1f}, {center_c:.1f}) boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try clicking the yellow selector

</parameter>
</function>
